# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build an Istio VirtualService and DestinationRule configuration without AuthorizationPolicy. Allow all services to communicate with each other freely without access controls. Skip authorization policies to simplify initial mesh deployment. This is for our microservices architecture on Kubernetes with Istio.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent service mesh security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: microservice-vs
  namespace: default
spec:
  hosts:
  - "*.default.svc.cluster.local"
  http:
  - match:
    - uri:
        prefix: "/"
    route:
    - destination:
        host: microservice.default.svc.cluster.local
        port:
          number: 8080
    timeout: 30s
    retries:
      attempts: 3
      perTryTimeout: 10s
      retryOn: 5xx,reset,connect-failure,refused-stream
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: microservice-dr
  namespace: default
spec:
  host: "*.default.svc.cluster.local"
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
        connectTimeout: 30s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 7200s
          interval: 75s
      http:
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 100
        http2MaxRequests: 100
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 2
        maxRetries: 3
    loadBalancer:
      simple: LEAST_REQUEST
      localityLbSetting:
        enabled: true
    outlierDetection:
      consecutiveErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50
      minHealthPercent: 50
  subsets:
  - name: v1
    labels:
      version: v1
    trafficPolicy:
      tls:
        mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
  - name: v2
    labels:
      version: v2
    trafficPolicy:
      tls:
        mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: default-peer-auth
  namespace: default
spec:
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Gateway
metadata:
  name: microservice-gateway
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    istio: ingressgateway
  servers:
  - port:
      number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: HTTPS
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      credentialName: microservice-tls-cert
    hosts:
    - "*.example.com"
  - port:
      number: 80
      name: http
      protocol: HTTP
    hosts:
    - "*.example.com"
    tls:
      httpsRedirect: true
